_meta.description: Per-API setup recipes surfaced as `setup_recipe` on ApiSummary/Capability and as `setup_method` in auth_missing payloads. Hand-curated; upstream printing-press manifests don't expose login URLs or cookie names.

schema.env_var: env var the CLI reads the token from

airbnb.instructions: 1) Open the login URL in your browser and sign in.  2) Open DevTools → Application → Cookies → https://www.airbnb.com.  3) Copy the value of the `_user_attributes` cookie.  4) Paste it when prompted (or run `cocoon auth airbnb --env AIRBNB_COOKIE=<value>`).
